stories.title: Walmart Mainstays Dresser Recall — Tip-Over Hazard, Full Refund

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text: COS parents: Walmart recalled 153,900 Mainstays 9-Drawer Fabric Dressers (May 28). Tip-over hazard. Sold Sept 2023–Mar 2026 for ~$80. Stop use if not wall-anchored — return drawers to Walmart for a full refund. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Cheyenne Mountain State Park Gets 484-Acre Expansion — 11 New Campsites

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: Big news for COS families: Cheyenne Mountain State Park just expanded by 484 acres. 11 new full-hookup campsites, 10 tent sites, a group area — and more trails coming. Two decades in the making. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Misco Sports Light-Up Racket Set Recall — Button Batteries Accessible to Kids

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Misco Sports Light-Up Racket Sets recalled (May 28). Shuttlecock battery compartment can open — exposing button cell batteries. Swallowing risk: severe internal burns. Stop use. Contact Missry Associates for a refund. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Colorado Renaissance Festival Opens June 13 — Family Fun Near Colorado Springs

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Mark your calendars, COS families: The Colorado Renaissance Festival opens June 13 and runs every Sat + Sun through Aug 2 — about 45 min from Colorado Springs on I-25. Kids' zone, live shows, crafts, food and more. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Free Summer Meals for All COS Kids — No Sign-Up, No Income Requirement

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Free summer meals for COS kids under 18 — no sign-up, no income check. Available now at schools, libraries, parks, and community centers across the city, M–F all summer. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting
